maelstrom_ganger.name: Maelstrom Ganger
maelstrom_ganger.description: A heavily chromed gang soldier. Body bristling with cheap implants, eyes replaced with glowing red optics.
dialogue: You shouldn't have come here, merc.
Chrome and pain — that's all you'll know!

maelstrom_chromer.name: Maelstrom Chromer
maelstrom_chromer.description: An upper-rank Maelstrom soldier with extensive military-grade chrome. Half machine, all dangerous.
dialogue: The flesh is weak. Chrome is eternal.
I can barely feel pain anymore. Can you say the same?

maelstrom_boss.name: Royce
maelstrom_boss.description: Leader of the Maelstrom gang. Paranoid, brutal, and wired to the teeth with combat chrome.
dialogue: You think you can buy your way through me?
I'm gonna paint these floors with you.

tyger_claws_soldier.name: Tyger Claw Soldier
tyger_claws_soldier.description: A neon-tattooed Tyger Claw enforcer. Fast on their feet and faster with a blade.
dialogue: You made a big mistake coming here.

tyger_claws_netrunner.name: Tyger Claw Netrunner
tyger_claws_netrunner.description: A Tyger Claw hacker. Uses their neural link to fry your cyberware from across the room.
dialogue: Your chrome is now mine to play with.
Uploading pain directly to your nervous system.

valentinos_soldier.name: Valentinos Gang Member
valentinos_soldier.description: A Valentinos soldier draped in gold. They fight for family, honor, and Heywood.
dialogue: You disrespect us? You disrespect El Santo.

6th_street_soldier.name: 6th Street Trooper
6th_street_soldier.description: A 6th Street soldier in military surplus. They think they're patriots defending the city.
dialogue: This is our turf. Back off or eat lead.

animals_brawler.name: Animals Brawler
animals_brawler.description: A massive Animals fighter, body built on stims and protein slurry. No chrome — just muscle.
dialogue: Try hitting me. I dare you.

voodoo_boys_netrunner.name: Voodoo Boys Hacker
voodoo_boys_netrunner.description: A Voodoo Boys netrunner. Speaks little, kills remotely. Their mind is already behind the Blackwall.
dialogue: You won't even see the daemon I'm uploading.
The net is darker than you know, cher.

militech_soldier.name: Militech Security
militech_soldier.description: A Militech corporate security trooper. Well-equipped, well-trained, and very expensive to replace.
dialogue: You are in a restricted area.

arasaka_soldier.name: Arasaka Trooper
arasaka_soldier.description: Elite Arasaka corporate soldier. Cyber-enhanced, disciplined, and utterly merciless.

arasaka_ninja.name: Arasaka Saburo
arasaka_ninja.description: An Arasaka cyber-ninja — silent, lethal, invisible until it's too late.

scavenger.name: Scavenger
scavenger.description: A desperate bottom-feeder who rips cyberware from still-warm bodies. Dangerous in numbers.

cyberpsycho.name: Cyberpsycho
cyberpsycho.description: A former merc or civilian who lost their humanity to too much chrome. A walking nightmare.
dialogue: THEY'RE ALL ENEMIES. EVERYONE IS AN ENEMY.
I AM THE ONLY REAL THING.

maxtac_officer.name: MaxTac Officer
maxtac_officer.description: A MaxTac anti-cyberpsycho unit. Among the most dangerous humans in Night City. They fight fire with fire.

rogue_ai_drone.name: Rogue AI Drone
rogue_ai_drone.description: An autonomous combat drone running a corrupted OS. No faction, no mercy, no stopping it without firepower.

steel_shell.name: Steel Shell
steel_shell.description: Activates armor plating, reducing damage taken by 40% for 2 turns.

swift_slash.name: Swift Slash
swift_slash.description: A lightning-fast blade attack. 80% chance to ignore armor.

short_circuit.name: Short Circuit
short_circuit.description: Overloads the target's cyberware, dealing electrical damage and stunning for 1 turn.

contagion.name: Contagion
contagion.description: Uploads a malware virus. Target takes 20 damage per turn for 3 turns.

system_collapse.name: System Collapse
system_collapse.description: Catastrophic hack. Deals massive damage and disables one of the player's abilities for 2 turns.

explosive_round.name: Explosive Round
explosive_round.description: Fires an explosive round dealing 120% damage and causing burning for 1 turn.

suppressive_fire.name: Suppressive Fire
suppressive_fire.description: Lays down heavy fire. Deals 80% damage but forces the target to dodge or take full damage.

grenade_toss.name: Grenade Toss
grenade_toss.description: Throws a grenade. Deals 100 flat damage, ignoring armor.

rage_strike.name: Rage Strike
rage_strike.description: A massive haymaker dealing 200% damage. Low accuracy.

desperate_lunge.name: Desperate Lunge
desperate_lunge.description: A reckless attack dealing 120% damage but reducing own armor by 5 for the turn.

stealth_strike.name: Stealth Strike
stealth_strike.description: An unseen attack. Guaranteed crit, deals 250% damage.

cyber_scan.name: Cyber Scan
cyber_scan.description: Scans and analyzes the target. Reduces target's dodge chance by 30% for 2 turns.
